rationale: Educ. Code §10.004 governs data-sharing memoranda of understanding among cooperating entities. It is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 10.004. COOPERATING ENTITIES. (a) The lead agency and each cooperating entity shall enter into a memorandum of understanding regarding the sharing of data for purposes of the system.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this data-sharing provision.
